page_content:
Transfer courses from non-regionally accredited institutions in the United States will be reviewed on an individual basis at the request of the student. Only transfer courses that have been deemed acceptable for transfer to UMD will be posted to the student’s academic record. Transfer courses from international institutions that are not recognized by the country’s Ministry of Education are not accepted for transfer and will not be awarded credit by UMD.
